mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ea_in_app_notification_recipient ( notification_id, recipient_user_id, read_status, read_time, delivery_status ) VALUES
(#{item.notificationId}, #{item.recipientUserId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readTime}, #{item.deliveryStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_in_app_notification_recipient WHERE recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0

SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, read_status AS readStatus, created_time AS createdTime FROM ea_in_app_notification_recipient WHERE recipient_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ea_in_app_notification_recipient SET read_status = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE recipient_user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ea_in_app_notification_recipient WHERE created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{retentionDays} DAY)
